reasoning: Taylor Swift, Bad Bunny, The Weeknd, and Drake consistently dominate the top spot for global Spotify streams, usually accumulating tens of billions of streams. While Eminem remains immensely popular and is among the top 15 most streamed artists, his annual stream count generally falls significantly short of the absolute #1 spot. Furthermore, since his recent major album was released in 2024, his streams in 2025 are unlikely to see the unprecedented surge required to leapfrog the currently dominant pop and Latin superstars. Therefore, the chance of him being the #1 most streamed artist in 2025 is extremely low.
